name: Service public de Wallonie
message: The Walloon Civil Service (SPW) is the administration of Wallonia. It consists of the General Secretariat, the SPW Support Service and the SPW digital service, which have cross-cutting competencies: internal and external communications, coordination of European structural funds, financial and operational audit, office, geomatics, personnel management, recruitment, training, human resource management, legal issues, information technology, informatics, management real estate and real estate.https://www.wallonie.be/fr
